response.justification: Critical skill gaps make this candidate unsuitable for the role. While they demonstrate excellent software craftsmanship and engineering practices, they lack mandatory requirements: only ~6 months of professional C++ experience (versus 5–10 years required), no demonstrated Windows platform C++ work, and limited SQL Server/Oracle expertise. Financial domain exposure exists but was delivered entirely in Node.js/JavaScript/TypeScript stacks, not capital markets systems. The foundational technical misalignment is disqualifying.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship emphasis with proven TDD, testing, and clean code practices across projects
Demonstrated ability to communicate and teach technical concepts through workshops, courses, and conference presentations
Solid DevOps and CI/CD pipeline experience including GitLab administration, Docker, and infrastructure setup
concerns: Critical C++ experience gap: only ~6 months of professional work (2014–2015) versus required 5–10 years; career has been overwhelmingly JavaScript/TypeScript/Node.js
No demonstrated Windows platform C++ development or strong SQL Server/Oracle expertise; role explicitly requires both
Finance domain exposure exists but entirely in web/SaaS stack (Node.js, GraphQL, React) rather than capital markets or investment banking systems
